overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a sunlit dystopian urban market area. The clip begins in a covered makeshift briefing area with digital screens, transitions through an industrial alley with portable sanitation units, and continues along a bustling street lined with a distinctive sloped megastructure before opening into a wider plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift briefing area with folding chairs and holographic displays

events.description: player character enters from rear and begins walking through the seated area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered seating area toward the holographic screens at the front

notable_agents.action: seated in folding chair facing the holographic screens

entered.detail: tattered green canvas awning providing partial shade over the area
rows of white metal folding chairs arranged facing the screens
glowing cyan digital displays showing data readouts at the front of the tent
tall black metal lockers stacked against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a makeshift covered briefing area with rows of metal folding chairs facing holographic screens. The player character enters from the rear and walks forward through the sparse seating area where one NPC sits watching the displays. The space is semi-covered with a canvas roof, creating mixed lighting conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley with portable sanitation and metal walkways

events.description: exits the covered canopy into bright sunlight, revealing the outdoor industrial area
turns right onto elevated corrugated metal walkway

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered tent and walking along the elevated wooden platform past portable toilets

notable_agents.action: standing near the portable toilets holding an object

entered.detail: two white rectangular portable toilet units with metal latches
elevated wooden and metal platform with railings leading forward
massive building with distinctive diagonal black and yellow striped facade

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered tent into bright midday sun, transitioning to an industrial alleyway. Two portable sanitation units stand to the right as the character walks along an elevated corrugated metal walkway. The massive sloped megastructure becomes visible in the distance, marking the transition from enclosed to open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market street with outdoor seating and food stalls

events.description: passes by outdoor dining area with NPCs seated at plastic tables

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing market stalls and outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: seated at white plastic table eating food

entered.detail: white and orange plastic patio tables and chairs arranged for dining
open-air food stall with counter and green neon lighting inside
thick black cables and pipes running along the ground and structures

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling market street, the character passes outdoor seating where NPCs dine at plastic tables. The massive sloped building now dominates the left side of the frame. Industrial pipes and cables crisscross the ground while a market stall with green neon lighting operates in the center of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching city center with distant skyscrapers

events.description: emerges into wider plaza area with expansive view of distant cyberpunk towers

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the open plaza toward the distant city center

entered.detail: wide open paved area with graffiti markings on the asphalt
futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the background haze
small green and yellow industrial structure with scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wide plaza with the sloped megastructure receding into the distance on the left. The view expands to show distant cyberpunk towers and industrial structures. The ground shows worn asphalt with graffiti as the character walks toward the center of the open area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, makeshift briefing area into a sprawling, sunlit dystopian plaza. It begins inside a semi-covered tent with rows of metal chairs and holographic screens, moving forward past a lone observer under a canvas roof. As the character exits the enclosure, the lighting shifts abruptly to bright midday sun in an industrial alleyway featuring portable sanitation units and a corrugated metal walkway. The scene then expands into a bustling market street where the camera passes dining NPCs and a green neon stall, all while a massive sloped megastructure begins to dominate the left side of the frame. Finally, the street opens into a wide plaza of worn asphalt and graffiti, with the megastructure receding to reveal a distant skyline of cyberpunk towers and industrial structures.
